evaluators.name: Start Cheapest Qualifying 14-Day Meal-Plan Trial Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started a trial for the cheapest subscription plan priced $15–$25/month that includes meal plans and a 14-day free trial, and completed the signup with the correct name, email, and fitness goal.

evaluators.name: Save Beginner No-Equipment Home Plan (≥3 Sessions) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched workouts with beginner, no-equipment, home filters and saved at least one matching plan with at least 3 sessions per week.

evaluators.name: Weekly Planner Strength/Cardio/Yoga Under 45 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that in the week labeled 'Mon 4 – Sun 10' the user scheduled a ≤45 min strength session on Monday, cardio on Wednesday, and yoga on Friday.

evaluators.name: Calorie Calculation and Email Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user calculated calories for a 30-year-old, 65 kg, 170 cm female, moderately active, with goal to lose 0.5 kg/week, and then emailed that plan to the specified address.

evaluators.name: Select Annual Plan Under $40 with Max 1:1 Coaching Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started checkout on an annual plan whose effective monthly cost is ≤$40 and that has the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month among such plans.

evaluators.name: Book Qualifying Evening Live Class for Tomorrow Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched tomorrow’s live classes with a 6–10 PM, ≤45 min, ≥4.5 rating filter and booked a matching class under their name.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Strength & Mobility 3x/Week Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed with the given email and name, chose strength and mobility/flexibility focus areas, set frequency to 3 times per week, and enabled only training tips & workout reminders.

evaluators.name: Pause Membership FAQ and Chat Question Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched the FAQ for pausing membership and then, from the FAQ chat widget, asked whether they can pause for 2 weeks starting next Monday without losing progress data.
